join6529.metadata.title: Join 6529
join6529.metadata.description: A state-aware guide for connecting a wallet, creating a profile, and joining public Waves on 6529.io.
join6529.hero.loggedOut.title: Join 6529
join6529.hero.loggedOut.subtitle: A community that decides what to build next — chat, vote, and collect together.
join6529.hero.inProgress.title: You're almost in
join6529.hero.inProgress.subtitle: Complete your profile to start posting, voting, and collecting.
join6529.hero.loggedIn.title: Welcome back
join6529.hero.loggedIn.subtitle: Jump into a Wave, vote, or add to your collection.
join6529.hero.point.collect.title: Art with purpose
join6529.hero.point.collect.body: Community-curated, CC0 art that funds public goods.
join6529.hero.point.reputation.title: Influence that compounds
join6529.hero.point.reputation.body: Hold Meme Cards over time to build TDH, which gives your votes more weight.
join6529.hero.point.voice.title: A real say
join6529.hero.point.voice.body: Vote in the Waves on what 6529 funds, builds, and mints next.
join6529.progress.label: Your progress
join6529.joining.loggedOut.heading: A simple path in.
join6529.joining.inProgress.heading: Pick up where you left off.
join6529.joining.loggedIn.heading: What you can do now.
join6529.joining.wallet.title: Connect a wallet
join6529.joining.wallet.body: Use your wallet to sign in and hold NFTs under your own identity.
join6529.joining.profile.title: Set up your profile
join6529.joining.profile.body: Choose your avatar, display name, bio, and connected wallets.
join6529.joining.waves.title: Join a Wave
join6529.joining.waves.body: A Wave is a public space to discuss, create, vote, and coordinate.
join6529.joining.participate.title: Participate
join6529.joining.participate.body: Post, reply, vote, submit work, or follow what others build.
join6529.joining.collect.title: Collect
join6529.joining.collect.body: Mint active drops, buy on secondary markets, or use subscription minting for future Meme Cards.
join6529.focus.heading: Things to do next
join6529.focus.subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
join6529.focus.subscriptions.body: Reserve upcoming Meme Cards: pick the cards you want, add funds, and 6529 can mint them for you during future drops.
join6529.focus.waves.title: Where the network coordinates.
join6529.focus.waves.body: Waves are open spaces to discuss, create, vote, and coordinate. Browse first, connect when ready.
join6529.focus.nfts.title: Submit a meme
join6529.focus.nfts.body: Artists submit new Meme Card art. The community votes in the Main Stage Wave on what becomes part of The Memes.
join6529.todo.profile.title: Create profile
join6529.todo.profile.body: Set your avatar, display name, bio, and connected wallets.
join6529.todo.delegation.title: Learn delegation
join6529.todo.delegation.body: Use a delegated wallet to act while your assets stay protected in your main holding wallet.
join6529.todo.help.title: Ask @help6529
join6529.todo.help.body: Ask @help6529 in a public Wave when you need a quick answer from the community.
join6529.faq.heading: Practical questions
join6529.faq.subheading: The basics before you dive in.
join6529.faq.walletEth.question: Do I need a wallet or ETH to start?
join6529.faq.walletEth.answer: No. You can browse first. Connect a wallet when you want to create a profile, post, vote, collect, or use subscription minting. ETH is only needed for minting, buying, gas, or funding subscription minting.
join6529.faq.tdh.question: What is TDH?
join6529.faq.tdh.answer: TDH means Total Days Held. Holding eligible Meme Cards over time builds TDH, which can give your votes more weight across 6529.
join6529.faq.memeCost.question: What does it cost to collect a Meme Card?
join6529.faq.memeCost.answer: The current mint price is 0.06529 ETH plus gas. Meme Cards typically drop Monday, Wednesday, and Friday, with artwork selected through TDH voting.
join6529.faq.subscriptions.question: How does subscription minting work, and is it refundable?
join6529.faq.subscriptions.answer: Subscription minting is remote minting for Meme Cards. Add a non-refundable balance, choose which eligible cards to mint, and skip drops you do not want.
join6529.faq.artUse.question: Can I use the art?
join6529.faq.artUse.answer: Yes. The Memes are CC0, meaning public domain art anyone can use. Holding the cards is what earns TDH over time.
